---
title: "Module 4 Assignment 1"
output: word_document
date: "2026-07-10"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown


```{r cars}
library(tidyverse)
library(VIM)
library(mice)
library(naniar)
library(skimr)
```

## Including Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r}
grades = read_csv("class-grades.csv")
```


```{r}
gg_miss_var(grades)
```


```{r}
vim_plot = aggr(grades, numbers = TRUE, prop = c(TRUE, FALSE),cex.axis=.7)
```


```{r}
grade_rowdel = grades %>% drop_na() 
```


```{r}
grades_coldel = grades %>% select(-Prefix,-Assignment) 
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)
imp_grades = mice(grades,  m=5, method='pmm', printFlag=FALSE)
```


```{r}
means_per_dataset <- complete(imp_grades, action = "long") %>%
  group_by(.imp) %>%
  summarize(mean_final = mean(Final))

print(means_per_dataset)
```
